command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Check ALL log files for the dropped message (agent.log, errors.log, debug) ==="
for f in gateway.log agent.log errors.log; do
  echo "--- $f (last 8 lines) ---"
  tail -8 /home/jose/.hermes/logs/$f 2>/dev/null
done

echo ""
echo "=== How does telegram.py decide a mention? Read the gating function ==="
grep -n "_message_mentions_bot\|def.*mention\|require_mention\|bot_username\|@\|self.bot" /home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/gateway/platforms/telegram.py 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "mention|username|bot" | head -20

echo ""
echo "=== Find the EXACT mention-matching logic ==="
sed -n '4560,4650p' /home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/gateway/platforms/telegram.py 2>/dev/null
REMOTE
